data.content: Implementation work pushed to branch feature/knots-a431-execution-plan-payload (commit 8c19fc0). Verification gap closed: added CLI smoke test (tests/cli_dispatch_execution_plan.rs) exercising kno update --execution-plan-file + show --json + rehydrate-after-eviction, plus a planned_by edge round-trip (src/app/tests_planned_by_edge.rs) confirming no parent_of cascade, no blocked_by gating, and exclusion from layout edges. make lint + make test green (1053 unit tests + integration suites, 0 failures).
